overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character exploring the castle. The clip begins in a dimly lit underground potions classroom, transitions through portrait-lined stone corridors, and ascends a grand gothic staircase. The environment features detailed medieval architecture, warm torchlight, and other students in wizarding robes.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground potions classroom with stone arches and worktables

events.description: group of students enters from right side and walks across the classroom
character turns and begins walking toward the exit door

agents.ego_description: standing near potion worktable initially, then walking toward the wooden exit door

wall-mounted torch providing warm flickering light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit underground potions classroom with stone vaulted ceilings and gothic arches. A wooden worktable with a glowing green cauldron sits in the foreground while students in wizarding robes walk across the room. The character stands near the potion table before turning to walk toward a wooden exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with portrait gallery and wall lanterns

events.description: character opens wooden door and exits classroom into stone corridor
character turns right while walking toward the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow stone corridor lined with portraits and wall lanterns

notable_agents.action: student in robes walking alongside the character down the corridor

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs and iron handle
gilded frames with painted portraits hanging on stone walls
ornate wall-mounted lantern casting warm light
large sweeping stone staircase visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the classroom through a heavy wooden door into a narrow stone corridor lined with portrait frames and wall lanterns. Walking alongside another student, they proceed down the hallway toward a grand staircase visible in the distance, passing gilded frames on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with sweeping staircase and stained glass windows

events.description: character enters grand hall and begins ascending the main staircase
character continues ascending the curving stone stairs toward upper landing

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand staircase alongside other students in wizarding robes

notable_agents.action: student ascending the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: large arched window with blue stained glass depicting a tree design
elaborate hanging candelabra with multiple lit candles
ornate stone balustrade with carved details along the staircase
ornate stone balustrade with carved details along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent grand hall with a sweeping stone staircase, large stained glass windows, and ornate chandeliers. Ascending the marble stairs alongside other students, the camera reveals the gothic architecture with stone railings and tall windows casting blue light into the warm interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the subterranean depths of a potions classroom into the airy grandeur of a gothic hall. It begins in a dimly lit underground room with vaulted ceilings, moving past a glowing green cauldron and students in robes toward a heavy wooden exit door. As the character steps through the doorway, the scene shifts into a narrow stone corridor where wall lanterns illuminate gilded portrait frames lining the path. The camera then proceeds down the hallway before opening into a magnificent hall featuring ornate chandeliers and sweeping marble stairs. Finally, the movement ascends the staircase alongside other students, transitioning from the warm interior light toward the cool blue glow cast by large stained glass windows.
